nav.accessHint: Open the portal of the product running for your business.

hero.paragraph: AYROMEX builds vertical AI products, WhatsApp assistants, voice agents, dashboards and automation systems that help companies reduce manual work and increase operational control.
hero.chatGreeting: Hi, I'm Ayro. What do you want to automate in your business?
hero.tooltipMessage: Just putting the finishing touches. Message me on WhatsApp meanwhile:

ayroGuide.hero: Hi. I'm Ayro. Welcome inside AYROMEX.
ayroGuide.productsIntro: Three products. One ecosystem working for you.
ayroGuide.productAyroDesk24: AyroDesk24 answers for you 24/7 on WhatsApp.
ayroGuide.productAyroStay: AyroStay handles your guests, in every language.
ayroGuide.processIntro: This is how we turn ideas into systems.
ayroGuide.process01: First we pin down the real problem together.
ayroGuide.process03: Then we ship the production version.
ayroGuide.ctaIntro: Ready to see AYROMEX work for you?
ayroGuide.ctaSubmitted: I heard you. Let's talk soon.
ayroGuide.verticalsIntro: We're not for everyone. We're for these four worlds.

verticalsSection.headline: 4 verticals. Zero compromises.
verticalsSection.subtitle: From ADM gaming to beauty studios, I build systems that work inside the Italian market.

adm.title: ADM Operators
adm.description: Network management, automated compliance, client retention on WhatsApp.

professional.title: Professional Studios
professional.description: AI WhatsApp receptionist, 24/7 bookings, multi-operator calendar sync.

hospitality.title: Hospitality
hospitality.description: Conversational booking, review handling, multi-language guest comms.

retail.title: Multi-Site Retail
retail.description: Custom automations, POS integration, cross-site dashboards.

productsSection.subtitle: Three vertical AI systems, each built for a specific industry and all connected to the same AYROMEX infrastructure.

ayrodesk24.name: AyroDesk24
ayrodesk24.tagline: AI WhatsApp receptionist for local businesses and SMEs
ayrodesk24.audience: Salons, beauty centres, restaurants, clinics, studios, SMEs

ayrohub.name: AyroHub
ayrohub.tagline: AI command center for complex operations
ayrohub.audience: ADM operators, gaming networks, sales networks, enterprise
ayrohub.bullet1: Orchestrated voice agents and WhatsApp flows
ayrohub.bullet2: Real-time dashboards, CRM and network control

ayrostay.name: AyroStay
ayrostay.audience: B&Bs, apartments, boutique hotels, property managers
ayrostay.bullet3: AI-driven review requests and guest upsell

processSection.subtitle: From discovery to deploy, a transparent path. You always know where we stand.
processSection.step1desc: I analyze your business, current processes and goals. Free, no strings attached.
processSection.step2desc: I build a navigable prototype. You touch it before signing anything.
processSection.step3desc: Development, testing, integrations. Full transparency, no black boxes.
processSection.step4desc: System in production, monitoring, evolution alongside your business.

agentsSection.label: AI Agents
agentsSection.title: Your AI team is already working
agentsSection.subtitle: Five specialized agents. Every day, all day.

agents.scout_desc: Finds, qualifies and segments leads in real time. Never sleeps, never fails.
agents.closer_desc: Handles objections, sends follow-ups and closes deals autonomously.
agents.builder_desc: Client onboarding, system setup, documentation. Zero human intervention.
agents.media_desc: Branded posts, emails and copy on every channel. Always on, always consistent.
agents.analyst_desc: Live dashboards, anomaly alerts and weekly reports delivered automatically.

whySection.label: Why us
whySection.title: Your business 90% automated
whySection.desc: We don't sell consulting. We build systems that work while you sleep.
whySection.item1desc: Your systems don't sleep, don't get sick, don't take holidays. Always operational.
whySection.item2desc: Clients see returns within 30 days. It's not a promise — it's the model.
whySection.item3desc: Plug-and-play. Your team uses the tool, doesn't manage it.

ctaSection.subtitle: Let's talk. No slides, just questions and answers.

outcomesSection.headline: Operational outcomes, not AI experiments.
outcomesSection.subtitle: AYROMEX products are designed to reduce manual work, speed up response times and give businesses more control over daily operations.

leadLoss.title: Fewer missed leads
leadLoss.description: No customer left without an answer. Every inquiry enters the system, even outside business hours.

response.title: Faster customer response
response.description: AI replies in seconds across WhatsApp, voice and connected channels.

manual.title: Less manual work
manual.description: Reminders, bookings, follow-ups and review requests handled end-to-end.

control.title: Centralized operational control
control.description: One place to see conversations, calendars, tickets and networks.

scale.title: Scalable workflows
scale.description: Multi-tenant architecture built to grow with volume, without rewriting processes.

visibility.title: Better visibility across systems
visibility.description: Dashboards, audit logs and live metrics on every connected system.

portalsSection.headline: Open your AYROMEX portal.
portalsSection.subtitle: Jump straight into the product running for your business. Every portal runs on AYROMEX infrastructure, with built-in dashboards, multi-tenancy and audit logs.

finalCtaSection.headline: Choose the AI system your business needs.
finalCtaSection.subtitle: From local business automation to complex operating systems, AYROMEX deploys AI products built to reduce manual work and increase operational control.

ayrodesk24DeepDive.focus: For local businesses that lose time answering repetitive messages, AyroDesk24 automates WhatsApp conversations, bookings, reminders and customer follow-up.

conversations.title: WhatsApp AI conversations
conversations.description: Answers questions, prices, hours and booking requests in natural language, 24/7.

bookings.title: Booking and calendar sync
bookings.description: Creates, edits and cancels appointments synced to Google Calendar per operator.

memory.title: Customer memory
memory.description: Remembers preferences, history and tone of voice. Every returning client is recognized.

escalation.title: Operator escalation
escalation.description: Hands the conversation to a human operator when needed, without losing context.

reminders.title: Automated reminders
reminders.description: Notifies both client and operator before the appointment. Fewer no-shows and last-minute cancellations.

crm.title: CRM timeline
crm.description: Every interaction in one searchable, exportable view.

ayrodesk24DeepDive.result: Fewer missed customers. Faster bookings. Less interruption. Better customer experience.

ayrohubDeepDive.focus: AyroHub centralizes voice agents, WhatsApp automation, dashboards, CRM workflows and business logic into one command center for structured networks and high-volume operations.

voice.title: Voice AI agents
voice.description: Inbound and outbound calls on fixed and mobile numbers, natural voice, escalation to live operators.

whatsapp.title: WhatsApp automation
whatsapp.description: Approved templates, segmented broadcasts and inbound conversations coordinated by central policies.

reactivation.title: Client reactivation
reactivation.description: Identifies dormant clients and runs voice + WhatsApp sequences with personalized messages.

network.title: Network management
network.description: Multi-tenant control for master, sub-licensees and points of sale, with granular permissions.

crm.title: CRM and dashboard sync
crm.description: Leads, tickets and live metrics in one data model. Webhooks into your existing systems.

workflow.title: Workflow automation
workflow.description: Configurable rules, escalation and SLAs. Centralized audit trail and business logic.

ayrohubDeepDive.result: More control. Faster reactivation. Better visibility. Scalable operations.

ayrostayDeepDive.focus: AyroStay helps B&Bs, apartments, small hotels and property managers automate guest communication before, during and after the stay.

messaging.title: Guest messaging
messaging.description: Answers questions, confirmations and service requests on WhatsApp and OTA channels, before, during and after the stay.

checkin.title: Check-in support
checkin.description: Document collection, guest reporting and access QR — without host intervention.

multilingual.title: Multilingual replies
multilingual.description: Italian, English, French, German, Spanish and more, with a consistent tone per property.

cleaning.title: Cleaning coordination
cleaning.description: Notifies the cleaning team at check-out, confirms room status, handles anomalies.

reviews.title: Review requests
reviews.description: Sends the right message at the right time on the right channel to maximize rating.

upsell.title: Upsell automation
upsell.description: Pitches late check-out, breakfast, transfers and local services in the guest's own language.

ayrostayDeepDive.result: Faster replies. Smoother check-ins. Less host workload. Better guest experience.

servicesSection.label: What we build
servicesSection.title1: From an idea to a system

services.s1desc: Autonomous agents active 24/7 managing clients, bookings and sales without human intervention.
services.s2desc: Your client writes or calls — your AI responds perfectly, 24 hours a day.
services.s3desc: Digital products built for gaming ADM, hospitality and SMEs. Ready to deploy, scalable.
services.s4desc: Websites and apps that convert. Not static showcases — client acquisition machines.
services.s5desc: Visual identity that positions your brand as a leader in its market.

serviziPage.label: Our services
serviziPage.desc: Every service is designed for a measurable result. No theory, no empty consulting.
serviziPage.ctaDesc: We analyze your business for free and tell you exactly what to automate first.
serviziPage.s1tagline: Your business responds, sells and manages clients 24/7
serviziPage.s1benefit: Without hiring extra staff. Without overtime. Without errors.
serviziPage.s1d2: Objection handling and FAQs without human intervention
serviziPage.s1d3: Intelligent escalation to your operators when needed
serviziPage.s1result: Our clients reduce unmanaged requests by 70% on average.
serviziPage.s2tagline: Your client writes or calls — your AI responds
serviziPage.s2benefit: In perfect language, 24 hours a day, even on weekends.
serviziPage.s2d4: Automatic reminders and follow-ups to clients
serviziPage.s2result: Zero clients lost due to missed responses. Ever.
serviziPage.s3tagline: Digital products built for your specific sector
serviziPage.s3benefit: Not generic solutions — systems designed for your market.
serviziPage.s3d2: AyroHub for gaming and ADM dealers
serviziPage.s3result: Products usable from day one, no technical training needed.
serviziPage.s4benefit: Not showcase sites — client acquisition machines.
serviziPage.s4d2: Integration with AI systems and automations
serviziPage.s4result: Sites that bring inquiries, not just visits.
serviziPage.s5benefit: Design that communicates authority before the client reads a word.
serviziPage.s5result: Brands that are remembered and chosen.

footer.brandTagline: AI Digital Agency. Bari, Puglia, Italy.
